caption: A 48-soldier Spearmen line, ordered 360 units due right of its facing -- too far to side-step, but not a rear move. It quarter-turns in place toward the destination (the wide line briefly reads as a narrow deep column, since only individual facing rotates -- the footprint doesn't reorganize yet), then widens back into a line facing the new heading (the reform hold), and only then marches -- never sliding sideways at speed.
